avoidSaying: see the entire URL in there
sentencePatterns: You can see the full URL there.
Open the source file and you can see the full URL there.
realLifeExamples: This is the source file, and you can see the full URL there.
Check the source page and you can see the full URL there.
usageNotes: 说链接是否完整时，full URL 比 entire URL 更自然。
productionPrompts: 用 You can see the full URL there. 造一句和源码、文档或网页有关的句子。
